---
name: 🎨 UI / Layout Anomaly
about: Report a responsive scaling breakage, rendering glitch, or neon blur failure.
title: "[UI-ANOMALY]: "
labels: ["ui-ux", "css-glitch"]
---

## 🎨 Layout Glitch Description
Describe the visual breakdown (e.g., text clip, box shadow clipping, button sizing overlapping).

## 📱 Hardware Viewport Matrix
- **Device Used:** [e.g., iPhone 15, Dell 4K Monitor, Pixel 8]
- **Screen Orientation:** [Portrait / Landscape]
- **Browser Layout Engine:** [e.g., WebKit, Blink, Gecko]

## 🧪 Expected Display Behavior
What should the glassmorphic interface look like in this specific display scenario?
